THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REID, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 325 POTRERO, #4, S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WILL STAY EXECUTION ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5:00PM ON 8/31/99. PLTF. WILL PAY DEFT. THE SECOND HALF OF THE RELOCATION FEE OF $500, UPON DEFT. VACATING AND TENDERING POSSESSION OF PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 8/31/99, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
